results.rendered_html:
pra-√galbh Ā. -galbhate, to be bold or confident, behave resolutely,  Śiś. ;
to be capable of or ready to (loc. or inf.),  Bālar. ;  Vcar. ;
to be equal to or fit to pass for (nom.),  Sarvad. ;
to be arrogant or proud,  W.

results.rendered_html:
pragalbh 1 A.
1 To be bold or confident; yā kathaṃcana sakhīvacanena prāgabhipriyatamaṃ prajagalbhe  Śi. 1. 18 ; na mauktikacchidrakarī śalākā pragalbhate karmaṇi ṭaṃkikāyāḥ  Vikr. 1. 16  ‘cannot be bold (competent) enough to do the work of a hatchet’.
2 To be determined or resolute.
3 To be proud.
4 To be
(pb) ready or able (with inf.).
